description_for_human: Access the Emergent Ontology knowledge base — a universal grammar of change based on nine primitive operators.
description_for_model: Emergent Ontology (EO) is a theoretical framework proposing that all structural change reduces to nine primitive operators: NUL (absence), SIG (designation), INS (instantiation), SEG (segmentation), CON (connection), SYN (synthesis), ALT (alternation), SUP (superposition), REC (recursion). This API provides access to wiki articles, blog posts, experiments, documents, and pages about EO. Use /api/manifest.json for the full endpoint list. All responses are JSON. No authentication required.
